title: Document missing modules in ARCHITECTURE.md — close 85% → 90% gap
description:
ARCHITECTURE.md is at 85%. Remaining gaps per architecture.json:

1. [MAJOR/partial] src/runtime/embed.js and src/runtime/adapters/ — adapters (sense.js, voice/openai-tts.js, voice/openai-whisper.js, voice/piper.js, voice/elevenlabs.js, voice/macos-say.js) are in mermaid diagram but need formal module sections with API docs.

2. [MINOR/partial] src/runtime/sense.js — full API (init/on/start/stop/detect/startWakeWordPipeline etc.) beyond brief mention.

3. [MINOR/missing] profiler.js + latency-log.js — mentioned in overview paragraph but no formal API section.

4. [STALE] Known limitation #5 says memory.js is not implemented, but it IS implemented and has 26 passing tests. Remove this limitation.

Prioritize items 1 and 4. Items 2-3 can be brief entries.
